title: Accessibility plans at Environment and Climate Change Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Accessibility plans at Environment and Climate Change Canada
Our accessibility plans at Environment and Climate Change Canada (ECCC) reflect our organization’s policies, programs, practices and services in relation to identifying and removing accessibility barriers and preventing new barriers in these areas.
- 2025 Accessibility plan at Environment and Climate Change Canada (ECCC)
- 2022 Accessibility plan at Environment and Climate Change Canada (ECCC)
